op.text: [as of 2025-11-08] First Friday off (2025-11-01) spent at Mt Hood cabin weekend with Sam; described relationship as 'solid, better than solid' and noted being 'lighter' and 'easier to live with' at four-day work week; Sam observed 'I like you at four days a week already, and it's been a week'

op.note: Session 2025-11-08: Dana reports no recurrence of work-stress displacement onto Sam during Mt Hood weekend (first Friday off); described relationship as 'solid, better than solid' and herself as 'lighter' at four-day schedule; Sam noted positive change after one week. Strain appears fully resolved by schedule reduction.
